quicksight.analysis.visual.CfnAbout:
A visual displayed on a sheet in an analysis, dashboard, or template.

This is a union type structure. For this structure to be valid, only one of the attributes can be defined.

quicksight.analysis.visual.BarChartVisua.Description: A bar chart.  For more information, see [Using bar charts](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/bar-charts.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.visual.BoxPlotVisual.Description: A box plot.  For more information, see [Using box plots](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/box-plots.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.visual.ComboChartVis.Description: A combo chart.  For more information, see [Using combo charts](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/combo-charts.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.visual.CustomContent.Description: A visual that contains custom content.  For more information, see [Using custom visual content](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/custom-visual-content.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.visual.FilledMapVisu.Description: A filled map.  For more information, see [Creating filled maps](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/filled-maps.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.visual.FunnelChartVi.Description: A funnel chart.  For more information, see [Using funnel charts](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/funnel-visual-content.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.visual.GaugeChartVis.Description: A gauge chart.  For more information, see [Using gauge charts](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/gauge-chart.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.visual.GeospatialMap.Description: A geospatial map or a points on map visual.  For more information, see [Creating point maps](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/point-maps.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.visual.HeatMapVisual.Description: A heat map.  For more information, see [Using heat maps](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/heat-map.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.visual.HistogramVisu.Description: A histogram.  For more information, see [Using histograms](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/histogram-charts.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.visual.InsightVisual.Description: An insight visual.  For more information, see [Working with insights](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/computational-insights.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.visual.KPIVisual.Description: A key performance indicator (KPI).  For more information, see [Using KPIs](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/kpi.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.visual.LineChartVisu.Description: A line chart.  For more information, see [Using line charts](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/line-charts.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.visual.PieChartVisua.Description: A pie or donut chart.  For more information, see [Using pie charts](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/pie-chart.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.visual.PivotTableVis.Description: A pivot table.  For more information, see [Using pivot tables](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/pivot-table.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.visual.RadarChartVis.Description: A radar chart visual.  For more information, see [Using radar charts](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/radar-chart.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.visual.SankeyDiagram.Description: A sankey diagram.  For more information, see [Using Sankey diagrams](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/sankey-diagram.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.visual.ScatterPlotVi.Description: A scatter plot.  For more information, see [Using scatter plots](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/scatter-plot.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.visual.TableVisual.Description: A table visual.  For more information, see [Using tables as visuals](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/tabular.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.visual.TreeMapVisual.Description: A tree map.  For more information, see [Using tree maps](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/tree-map.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.visual.WaterfallVisu.Description: A waterfall chart.  For more information, see [Using waterfall charts](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/waterfall-chart.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.visual.WordCloudVisu.Description: A word cloud.  For more information, see [Using word clouds](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/word-cloud.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.
